description: Use this API to set zone integer extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr = set_ext_zone_int(izone, string, ival)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension zone field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘IVAL’ not set.
Unknown error with data access; ‘IVAL’ not set.
API Prereqs not met; ‘IVAL’ not set.
